spec.overview: Add a new in-memory stub module for data providers that exactly implements the three existing Protocol contracts using seeded records and pure in-memory filtering. Filtering must be symbol-based plus inclusive date boundaries, with date normalization handled by a shared _to_date helper. Add a dedicated contract test file mirroring the T02 universe style with at least 13 tests and no external I/O.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.AC7: No HTTP or file I/O in stubs or tests

notes: Pure filtering over seeded records, defensive list copies, inclusive date comparisons via _to_date.
